channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump and Xi agree Strait of Hormuz 'must remain open'
item.description: President Trump and China's Xi Jinping met in Beijing on Thursday, while Israel and Lebanon are set to resume peace talks in Washington.

item.title: Iran says it is prepared for a potential new U.S. attack while Trump visits China
item.description: Iran's military states it is trained and ready for any new U.S. assault, as President Trump anticipates a lengthy discussion on the war with China's President Xi.

item.title: Federal authorities arrest tourist accused of throwing rock at endangered seal's head
item.description: The tourist caused outrage after a witness recorded him throwing a coconut-sized rock at Lani, a beloved Hawaiian monk seal off a Maui beach.

item.title: LIVE: ABC News Live
item.description: Continuous coverage of breaking news and live events around the clock
